productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Techno Black Backpack
description: Style Note vital gear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Techno Gear bag from VITAL Gear. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Product Details Black laptop backpack Two adjustable backpack straps with click clock closure and an adjustable waist strap Mesh padding at the back Two main compartments with a padded separator with Velcro straps to close and an internal net zippered pouch in one compartment and an open pocket and an internal net zippered pouch in the other compartment One more compartment in the front with a number of internal open organiser pouches Two zippered pockets on the side Warranty: 3 years Material and Care Polyester blend Wipe surface with a damp cloth when necessary Size Height: 40 cm Width: 29 cm Depth: 11 cm
